title: schizanthus litoralis var. litoralis
intro: Schizanthus litoralis var. litoralis, commonly known as the coastal schizanthus or sea flower, is a flowering plant native to the coastal regions of South Africa. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Schizanthus litoralis var. litoralis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall well-being and to treat various health conditions.
